name: mark-heartflow-skill
description: HeartFlow AI cognitive and self-healing skill runtime.

scripts.check: find src scripts bin plugins -name '*.js' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print0 | xargs -0 -n 1 node --check
scripts.test: npm run check && npm run smoke && node scripts/test_v11_6.js && node scripts/test_v11_7.js
